title: ASR Federal 4pc Warm and White Light EMT Diagnostic Pen Light with Pupil Gauge

ASR Federal 4pc Warm and White Light EMT Diagnostic Pen Light with Pupil Gauge

The ASR Federal Warm and White Light EMT Diagnostic Pen Light with Pupil Gauge and Pocket Clip Set of Four in silver and black are professional grade medical diagnostic pen lights, used to examine eyes, ears, throat, nose and mouth by doctors, nurses, first responders, EMT’s and other trauma and medical professionals for health assessments.

The four-piece EMT medical diagnostics pen light set includes two silver pen lights and two black pen lights:

Key Features

  • EMT ESSENTIAL TOOL: This ASR Federal set of four (4) silver and black medical diagnostic penlights are used to examine eyes, ears, throat, nose and mouth by doctors, nurses, first responders, EMT’s and other trauma and medical professionals for health assessments; a great tool to carry in your purse, work bag, first aid kit or with your survival gear in case of a medical emergency or a flashlight is needed
  • BLACK PEN LIGHT: The black EMT diagnostic pen light features warm lighting, specifically for assessing a person’s pupil dilation via the handy pupil gauge, as well as a small 5cm rule for measuring pupil dilation, both found on the exterior body of the pen light tool
  • SILVER PEN LIGHT: The silver EMT diagnostic pen light features bright white lighting, specifically for assessing the ears, eyes, throat, nose and mouth for any abnormalities
  • MINIMALIST COMPACT DESIGN: Featuring a sturdy aluminum body, the nursing pen light is lightweight and easily portable; the pen light also includes a handy pocket clip, great for attaching to a pocket or notebook, as well as a push down button to easily and quickly turn the pen light on and off
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Package Includes: two (2) silver pen lights and two black pen lights; Battery Operated: eight (8) AAA batteries included; Dimensions: 5.5 inches long x 0.5 inches wide; Material: aluminum; Weight: 0.2 ounces

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASRFPL4PC
  • UPC: 810058487759
  • Color: Black
  • Size: 5.5 in

BLACK PEN LIGHT: The black EMT diagnostic pen light features warm lighting, specifically for assessing a person’s pupil dilation via the handy pupil gauge, as well as a small 5cm rule for measuring pupil dilation, both found on the exterior body of the pen light tool

SILVER PEN LIGHT: The silver EMT diagnostic pen light features bright white lighting, specifically for assessing the ears, eyes, throat, nose and mouth for any abnormalities

Weighing just 0.2 ouches or 0.0125 pounds, the ASR Federal pen light EMT tool is minimalist and compact in its design; Featuring a sturdy aluminum body, the nursing pen light is lightweight and easily portable. The pen light also includes a handy pocket clip, great for attaching to a pocket or notebook if you’re on the go, as well as a push down button to easily and quickly turn the pen light on and off when you need it.

Battery operated, your purchase includes eight (8) AAA batteries so you don’t have to worry about the nuisance of carrying USB cables, a battery pack or charging station. The battery-operated feature also makes the pen light a great alternative to a flashlight, tactical, trekking, backpacking or otherwise, or if you’re working on home electrical or auto and/or mechanical repairs.
